evals.prompt: How do I provide a Retrofit instance as a singleton using Hilt so it's shared across the whole app?
evals.expected_output: Create a NetworkModule with @Module @InstallIn(SingletonComponent::class). Use @Provides @Singleton fun provideRetrofit(). Prefer @Binds over @Provides for interface bindings.

evals.prompt: When should I use @Binds vs @Provides in a Hilt module?
evals.expected_output: @Binds for binding an interface to its implementation (abstract, no body) — generates less code. @Provides when the object construction requires logic or third-party classes.

evals.prompt: My ViewModel needs a parameter that's only known at runtime (e.g., a product ID). How do I inject that with Hilt?
evals.expected_output: Use @AssistedInject for the ViewModel constructor plus @Assisted for the runtime parameter. Create an @AssistedFactory. In Compose, use hiltViewModel() with a factory.
